title: Intense Ukrainian Pork Casserole
description: A rich, gooey braised pork dish with sweet paprika and herbs, perfect for meal prep and satisfying any dinner table.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a heavy pot over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add pork cubes and brown all sides, about 5 minutes, removing browned pieces to a plate.
In the same pot, sauté onion, garlic, and carrot until softened, about 3 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste and paprika, cooking for 1 minute to release aromas.
Return pork to pot, add bay leaves, low-sodium broth, and salt; bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and braise for 90 minutes, turning once, until pork is tender.
Taste and adjust seasoning with pepper; remove bay leaves.
Sprinkle chopped dill over the casserole and serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
